appStore.title: Princess Fairy Tale Coloring Wonderland for Kids and Family Preschool Free Edition
appStore.description:
Travel to a magical land of colorful discovery with unicorns, rainbows, ponies and castles as you join the princess and help her fill the world with color. As each scene unfolds, new interactive characters and items appear!

An intuitive user interface ensures that even the youngest players can have fun too! Helpful hints show you where to touch next and each page tells its own unique story!

• Ride a wild unicorn through the clouds!
• Decorate your room with a magic wand!
• Explore the castle to find cute pets!
• Paint a royal family portrait!
• Use your magic to build a rainbow bridge!
• Meet the handsome prince under a starry sky!

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!!”

- Blake, Mike & Amanda, Eggroll Games
